subject: Fw: Jeffrey Epstein: Paris
body:
-----Original Message-----
From: Nili Priell <nilipr@netvision.net.il>

Date: Mon, 21 Jan 2008 13:56:53 
To:kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: RE: Jeffrey Epstein: Paris


Hello Sarah
The meeting has to take place in our hotel because of security difficulties.
Sorry.
The hotel is Hotel Raphael - 17 Ave. Kleber. - Paris 16
Please confirm
Thanks
nili

-----Original Message-----
From: kellens@earthlink.net [mailto:kellens@earthlink.net] 
Sent: Friday, January 18, 2008 8:35 PM
To: Nili Priell
Subject: RE: Jeffrey Epstein: Paris

Great, thank you Nili..
Jeffrey said you are both welcome to meet him at his apartment in Paris if
that works for you..

the

>cell phone no.
>Best
>nili
>
>-----Original Message-----

body_html:
-----Original Message-----
From: Nili Priell nilipr@netvision.net.il

Date: Mon, 21 Jan 2008 13:56:53
To:kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: RE: Jeffrey Epstein: Paris

Hello Sarah
The meeting has to take place in our hotel because of security difficulties.
Sorry.
The hotel is Hotel Raphael - 17 Ave. Kleber. - Paris 16
Please confirm
Thanks
nili

-----Original Message-----
From: kellens@earthlink.net [mailto:kellens@earthlink.net]
Sent: Friday, January 18, 2008 8:35 PM
To: Nili Priell
Subject: RE: Jeffrey Epstein: Paris

Great, thank you Nili..
Jeffrey said you are both welcome to meet him at his apartment in Paris if
that works for you..

-----Original Message-----

From: Nili Priell nilipr@netvision.net.il
Sent: Jan 18, 2008 8:19 AM
To: kellens@earthlink.net
Subject: RE: Jeffrey Epstein: Paris

Hi Sarah
Please tell Jeff that the meeting will be held at 8:30 p.m. on Tuesday -
the
place is yet to be decided. We will be in touch and I shall let you know
our
cell phone no.
Best
nili

-----Original Message-----
From: kellens@earthlink.net [mailto:kellens@earthlink.net]
Sent: Wednesday, January 16, 2008 5:30 PM
To: Nili Priell
Subject: Jeffrey Epstein: Paris

Hello Nili!
Jeffrey has just informed me that Mr. Barak will be meeting with Jeffrey in
Paris at his apartment this coming Tuesday evening. I wanted to give you
the
address and phone number to the apartment:

22 Ave Foch Apt. 2DD
The outside gate code is: 4079, when you come to the second gate, just ring
apt. 2DD. the phone number is +33144170210. My cell will also work there
just in case..
Thanks! Sarah
